NSCameraUsageDescription: UHUB needs camera access to take photos for posts, avatars, and messages.
NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: UHUB needs photo library access to select images for posts, avatars, and messages.
NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: UHUB needs microphone access to record voice messages.
NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: UHUB needs speech recognition access to convert voice to text.
